Cars.name: Mercedes-AMG GLE 53
Cars.description: The 2024 Mercedes-AMG GLE 53 Coupe seamlessly blends coupe-like athleticism with SUV practicality. Powered by a 429-hp mild-hybrid inline-6, it launches from 0-60 in just 5.2 seconds. The cabin features AMG-specific upholstery, dual 12.3-inch displays, and ambient lighting with 64 colors. Its sloping roofline and AMG Night Package give it an aggressive, head-turning presence on Accra streets.

Cars.name: BMW M2/M4 Concept 2025
Cars.description: A bold glimpse into BMW's performance future, the 2025 M2/M4 Concept combines extreme aero elements with a futuristic digital cockpit. A twin-turbo inline-6 sends power to the rear wheels via an 8-speed M Steptronic, while configurable drive modes adjust suspension, exhaust, and even steering feedback. The interior strips away distractions, focusing on a wrap-around screen suite and lightweight racing seats.

Cars.name: BMW M3 (F80) 2018
Cars.description: This 2018 BMW M3 (F80) in iconic Nardo Grey delivers 444 hp from its twin-turbo inline-6. Enhanced with custom gloss-black wheels and eye-catching yellow calipers, it also features a sport-tuned suspension and an M-specific exhaust with adjustable baffles. Inside, carbon-fiber trim and supportive M seats create a driver-focused environment, making every Kumasi commute feel like a track day.

Cars.name: Infiniti QX80 2025
Cars.description: The all-new 2025 Infiniti QX80 redefines full-size luxury with a twin-turbo V6 and a refined, ultra-quiet cabin. Standard features include a 14.3-inch infotainment display, semi-aniline leather seats with massaging function for first and second rows, and a Klipsch® audio system. Its new grille and slim LED lighting give it a modern, commanding stance, while ProPILOT Assist 2.0 enables hands-off highway driving.

Cars.name: Range Rover (L405) 2021
Cars.description: A sophisticated white-on-white 2021 Range Rover L405, powered by a torquey diesel V6 perfect for city cruising. It features air suspension that glides over potholes, a panoramic roof, and Windsor leather seats with heating and cooling. With its iconic floating roof design and impeccable maintenance record, this SUV is the ultimate choice for executive travel or a stylish weekend in the Aburi hills.

Cars.name: Range Rover (L460) 2024
Cars.description: The 5th-generation 2024 Range Rover L460 in stealth matte black, featuring exclusive 23 turbine wheels and a subtle SV Bespoke interior. Under the hood, a smooth 4.4L V8 produces 523 hp. The cabin offers massage rear seats, a 13.1-inch rear entertainment system, and active noise cancellation. Whether parked outside Accra Mall or exploring the coast, this Range Rover exudes modern British luxury.

Cars.name: Mercedes-AMG G 63 2023
Cars.description: The legendary 2023 Mercedes-AMG G 63 in Arabian Grey, powered by a 577-hp handcrafted V8. Enhanced with an optional bull bar, 22-inch AMG wheels, and a G Manufaktur interior, it's as capable off-road as it is on the Spintex Road. The signature door-closing thud, three locking differentials, and a roaring exhaust make this G-Wagon a true status symbol in Accra.

Cars.name: Lamborghini Urus 2024
Cars.description: A head-turning 2024 Lamborghini Urus wrapped in matte olive green, packing 657 hp from its twin-turbo V8. Carbon-ceramic brakes, active anti-roll bars, and six drive modes (including Corsa and Sabbia) make it equally ferocious on the track and in the desert. The low-slung, angular design, combined with a fighter-jet-inspired cockpit, ensures you'll arrive at any East Legon venue in supercar style.

Cars.name: Audi RS Q8 2023
Cars.description: This 2023 Audi RS Q8 features a custom widebody kit in matte emerald green, housing a 591-hp twin-turbo V8. Quattro all-wheel drive and an 8-speed Tiptronic deliver 0-100 km/h in 3.8 seconds. The interior combines RS sport seats with green contrast stitching, while the virtual cockpit shows boost pressure and G-forces. It's a subtle yet ferocious machine for Accra's streets.

Cars.name: Mercedes-AMG GLE 63 S 2024
Cars.description: A one-of-a-kind 2024 Mercedes-AMG GLE 63 S finished with a custom matte wrap and vivid pink accents. Its 603-hp V8 rockets from 0-60 in 3.7 seconds, aided by a 48-volt mild-hybrid system. The cabin features AMG performance seats, carbon-fiber trim, and a 3D Burmester® sound system. Bold, unique, and incredibly fast, this is an SUV for those who refuse to blend in on Adjiringanor roads.

Cars.name: Tesla Cybertruck 2024
Cars.description: The 2024 Tesla Cybertruck in its raw stainless steel finish, now with an optional matte stealth wrap and rugged all-terrain tires. Featuring steer-by-wire, a 17-inch touchscreen, and a 6-seat cabin with armored glass, it's rated for over 500 miles of range. The adaptive air suspension and off-road mode make it capable on rocky trails, while the vault-like bed offers 100 cubic feet of lockable storage.

Cars.name: Tesla Model S Plaid 2023
Cars.description: A matte-black 2023 Tesla Model S Plaid, the quickest production car ever tested by many outlets, reaching 0-60 in under 2 seconds. Its tri-motor all-wheel-drive system produces over 1,000 hp. Inside, the yoke steering wheel, 17-inch cinematic display, and rear gaming screen create a spaceship-like experience. Ludicrous Plus mode preconditions the battery for maximum drag-strip performance.

Cars.name: Lexus RX 350 2022
Cars.description: The 2022 Lexus RX 350 in Nebula Gray delivers a serene, vault-like ride with a 295-hp V6 and standard all-weather capability. The cabin features NuLuxe seats, a 12.3-inch navigation screen, and Lexus Safety System+ 2.0 (including pre-collision and lane tracing). Its signature spindle grille and sharp LED headlights give it a modern edge, perfect for business trips or family road trips around Accra.

Cars.name: Ford F-150 Lariat 2022
Cars.description: This 2022 Ford F-150 Lariat in Sport Appearance trim features a 5.0L V8, gloss-black 20-inch wheels, and a factory tow package rated for 11,000 lbs. Inside, leather-trimmed heated seats, a 12-inch digital cluster, and Ford's Sync 4 with onboard generator functionality make work or play effortless. Ideal for hauling boats, trailers, or simply dominating Tema highways.

Cars.name: Ford Explorer 2010
Cars.description: A well-maintained 2010 Ford Explorer in vibrant electric blue with chrome wheels and factory roof rails. Its 4.0L V6 provides dependable power, while the 7-passenger seating with rear stowable third row offers exceptional utility. The interior remains clean and functional, with cold A/C and an auxiliary input. A budget-friendly, spacious SUV perfect for weekend trips to Lake Bosomtwe or moving gear around Kumasi.

Cars.name: Cadillac Escalade-V 2025
Cars.description: The 2025 Cadillac Escalade-V is the most powerful full-size SUV ever, with a supercharged 6.2L V8 producing 682 hp. Finished in a stealth blacked-out package with red Brembo calipers, it features Magnetic Ride Control 4.0 and a 38-inch curved OLED display spanning the dash. Super Cruise enables true hands-free driving, while 38-speaker AKG audio and massaging seats pamper all seven occupants. Ultimate luxury, immense power for Accra's elite.
